objectives.text: Speak with Doryani, then Alva
Take the Boat Charter
notes: Speak with Tujen, Ange, Kanu and Makoru to select an island

objectives.text: Suggested island order (UNCONFIRMED):
notes: Whakapanu first (currency exchange)
Shrike and Prison as 'main' islands
Arastas after three islands
Ngamahu after Arastas

objectives.text: Talk to Missionary Lorandis (after first island)
notes: In front of where Rog is

objectives.text: Talk to Tavakai (after first island)
notes: On second ship

objectives.text: Talk to Makoru (ship) about map pieces
After all four map pieces: Plunder's Point unlocked
notes: Optional island for XP and loot

objectives.text: Return to Ange (town) for hideout quest
notes: Enables trading after clearing and inviting

objectives.text: After Shark Fin: sail to Ngamahu and turn in at Kaimana
notes: Or wait until after Arastas (UNCONFIRMED)

objectives.text: After Isle of Kin: speak with Matiki (Boat)
notes: Unlocks Eye of Hinekora

objectives.text: After Kedge Bay: speak to Tujen for quest reward
Find the Crabshell Cavern and defeat the rare
notes: Alongside beach part

objectives.text: Find the Shark Pit and defeat the Great White One for Shark Fin
notes: Before Arastas or after main quest
Trigger by moving close to water gaps in rock
objectives.reward: Shark Fin + Uncut Gem choice (on Ngamahu)

objectives.text: Find the Petrified Pirate to get torn map piece
Find the exit to the Singing Caverns
notes: Approximately far end of island (UNCONFIRMED)

objectives.text: Find the Beckoning Clam and complete counter for Humming Pearl
notes: Turn in to Rog in town

objectives.text: Find the Chamber of Echoes and kill Diamora, Song of Death
Speak to the Hooded One
Go back to the Ship and select new location
Find the Corpse Nest encounter and loot torn map piece
Find the corrupted nests and kill the Scourge of the Skies
Go back to the Ship and select new location
Kill monsters until the Chapel Key drops
Find and open the Chapel Door, kill the rare and its minions
Find the exit to the Solitary Confinement
notes: 30% increased Mana or Life Recovery from flasks — can be changed later.

objectives.text: Find and kill Bronnach, the Manhunter
notes: Guaranteed unique + rares (UNCONFIRMED)

objectives.text: Find and kill the prisoner
Go back to the Ship and select new location
Find the Voltaxic Spire (big sulphur rock)
notes: 30% movement, 30% damage as lightning, 15% ele res for zone

objectives.text: Find the beast pen counter, free and kill Mimbok the Enslaved
Find the wrecked boat and loot torn map device from flayed sailor
Find the Primal Arena and kill The Blind Beast
Find the exit to the Volcanic Warrens
Find the Tyrant's Throne and kill Krutog, Lord of Kin
Speak with Matiki
Go back to the Ship and select new location
Find the dead man's chest and loot torn map device
Find the exit to Journey's End
Summon and speak to Tujen
Find and loot the rigged ship
notes: Timer starts on first chest — loot disappears after.

objectives.text: Find the Captain's Chair, kill Captain Hartlin and loot the Verisium
Go back (via checkpoint) and talk to Freya Hartlin
Go back to town, speak with Dannig and take the Verisium Spikes
Return to Journey's End and talk to Freya Hartlin again
Impale one of the totems and finish the Delirium encounter by killing Omniphobia
Port back to town and speak with Tujen
When briefly exiting caves, find rare chest behind waterfall
notes: (UNCONFIRMED)

objectives.text: Progress through cavern and complete each 'Test of Mettle' encounter
notes: Very linear, impossible to miss except the next one

objectives.text: Find the Silent Hall and press F in the room behind it
notes: Pay respects

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Hall of the Dead
Find the three tests (Tawhoa, Tasalio, Ngamahu) and loot blank tattoos
notes: Turn in at totem in arena, use tattoo for bonus

objectives.text: Find Yama's Test, defeat Yama the White and loot Silver Coin
Exit to the Trial of the Ancestors behind Yama encounter
Talk to Navali and get the Tattoo of Hinekora
Future third way of acquiring ascendency points
notes: Not yet implemented

objectives.text: Go back to the Ship and select new location
Summon and speak to Dannig, then place explosives and start Expedition encounter
Go back to the Ship and select new location
Talk to and follow Missionary Lorandis into church, then go out again
Destroy the forcefield with attack/spell and kill everyone
Find the Evening and Morning Bell
notes: Hug left wall for evening bell, right wall for morning bell (UNCONFIRMED)

objectives.text: Continue until you find the Excavated Pit and kill Torvian, Hand of the Saviour
Enter the Excavation
Find the Excavated Cache
Find the Precursor Forge and defeat Benedictus, First Herald of Utopia
Witness lore events, talk to Hidden One, return via portal
Talk to the Hidden One again
Talk to Rhodri on the ship to set sail to Ngamahu
Find the Medicine Circle and talk to Kaimana
notes: Choose 1 of 3 uncut gems (before Arastas or after main quest)

objectives.text: Turn in Shark Fin from Whakapanu Island
notes: Use lore options to get turn-in option

objectives.text: Find and enter the Heart of the Tribe
Find the Sacred Interior and defeat Tavakai
Go back to town and speak with the Hooded One
This is the end of Act 4
